meaning: n. 最后审判日,世界末日
examples: My father spent years building his Doomsday Machine.
It's the retail version of the doomsday machine.
Exact date aside, the doomsday ball was now rolling.
That's what every entrepreneur faces under the best of circumstances--terrifying debts, endless doubters, looming doomsday.
As with all creative destruction, this is good news for some and doomsday for others.
